name: usw
description: Initialize an OpenSpec-compatible USW workspace and resume local work across sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize OpenSpec and resume local work.
interface.longDescription: Initializes an OpenSpec-compatible shared workspace plus developer-local USW state, saves factual Markdown handoffs before pauses, and resumes work from one concrete next action.
defaultPrompt: Run /usw-init to create or adopt an OpenSpec workspace, then use /usw-handoff before a pause and /usw-resume in the next task.
